title: Coloured Hearts
description: Colors your hearts based off your team colour
body:
A client sided mod that will colour your hearts based off of your team. It can be very useful for Life Series, mostly a quality of life mod. Supports all team colours on the client side. It does not override things like poison and absorbtion hearts, they will still look how they should.
Example of what it looks like on a dark green team:
![A Minecraft hotbar showing hearts coloured dark green for a team with the dark green colour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0c9717b937aa8cc755b6198b9d0b8e6afa10cbb.png)
